name: Livent Corporation
description: Livent Corporation is a leading global lithium company focused on the production of high-quality lithium chemicals used in energy storage, specialty polymers, and chemical synthesis. As a pure-play lithium producer, the company operates one of the lowest-cost lithium carbonate production facilities in the world in Argentina and maintains downstream processing capabilities in the United States, England, and China. Livent is a critical supplier to the electric vehicle industry, providing battery-grade lithium hydroxide and carbonate essential for high-performance lithium-ion batteries.
